name: True North Business Loan agent skills
description: Discovery index of agent-facing capabilities exposed by truenorthbusinessloan.ca.

skills.name: loan-estimator
skills.description: 60-second quiz that matches Canadian and US small businesses to business loan offers from $5K to $800K.

skills.name: loan-products
skills.description: Human-readable descriptions of available loan products (equipment financing, small business loans, MCA, invoice factoring).

skills.name: industries-served
skills.description: Directory of industries True North serves, with per-industry landing pages.
